message.content:
@startuml
'!option handwritten true

title 迭代器模式

' Aggregate interface
interface Aggregate {
  <<interface>>
  + Iterator iterator()
}

' Iterator interface
interface Iterator {
  <<interface>>
  + boolean hasNext()
  + T next()
}

' BookShelf class
class BookShelf {
  <<class>>
  + BookIterator iterator()
}

' BookIterator class
class BookIterator {
  <<class>>
  - BookShelf bookShelf
  + boolean hasNext()
  + Book next()
}

' Relationships
Aggregate ..|> BookShelf : implements
Iterator ..|> BookIterator : implements
BookShelf --> BookIterator : contains

' Notes
note left of Aggregate
  集合，用于创建Iterator迭代器接口
end note

note right of BookIterator
  具体的迭代器，
  包含了遍历集合所必须的信息（bookShelf）
end note

note left of BookShelf
  会创建出具体的Iterator角色
end note

@enduml
